en.title: Best Creatine Supplements of 2026: Monohydrate Powders, Gummies and Women's Formulas Ranked
en.description: The creatine monohydrate powders, gummies, and women's formulas worth buying in 2026, ranked on source purity, third-party testing, clinical dose, format, and cost per serving.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳肌酸排行榜：單水肌酸粉、肌酸軟糖與女性配方實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年值得買的單水肌酸粉、肌酸軟糖與女性專屬配方，從原料純度、第三方檢驗、臨床劑量、劑型到每份成本完整排名。

en.description: 5 g of Creapure creatine monohydrate per serving, single ingredient, NSF Certified for Sport per batch, at roughly 49 cents a serving in the 90-serving tub.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克 Creapure 單水肌酸，單一成分零添加，每批都過 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，90 份裝算下來一份大約台幣十五塊，這規格加這價位很難找到對手。

en.description: 5 g of micronized creatine monohydrate per serving, banned-substance tested, and one of the lowest costs per serving from a mainstream brand you can buy almost anywhere.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克微粒化單水肌酸，通過禁用物質檢驗，每份成本是主流大牌裡最低的其中之一，到處都買得到，第一次吃肌酸閉著眼睛入手都不會錯。

en.description: 5 g of Signature Spec creatine per serving, NSF Certified for Sport, and additionally tested for PFAS, heavy metals and microplastics, the strictest purity screen in this field.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克 Signature Spec 肌酸，過 NSF Certified for Sport，還額外檢驗 PFAS、重金屬與微塑膠，純度篩檢是這份榜單裡最嚴的，對成分潔癖的人這款最安心。

en.description: 5 g of creatine monohydrate plus 1.5 g HMB, vitamin D3 and BioPerine per serving, Informed Sport certified with a fully disclosed label and seven flavors.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克單水肌酸再加 1.5 克 HMB、維他命 D3 與黑胡椒萃取，過 Informed Sport 認證，成分表完全透明，七種口味加無味版，想要調味好喝又不藏成分的選這款。

en.description: 5 g of micronized Creapure creatine per serving with a naturally sweetened flavored option, third-party lab tested and shipped with a published certificate of analysis.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克微粒化 Creapure 肌酸，有天然甜味劑調味版可選，第三方實驗室檢驗還附上公開的成分分析報告，想要有口味又要透明度的這款平衡得不錯。

en.description: 5 g of Creapure creatine per serving in a gummy, NSF Certified for Sport and potency-verified by Eurofins, the gummy I trust to actually contain what the label says.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克 Creapure 肌酸做成軟糖，過 NSF Certified for Sport，還請 Eurofins 驗過實際含量，在一堆標示灌水的肌酸軟糖裡，這款是我敢相信真的有那個劑量的。

en.description: 5 g of micronized creatine monohydrate per serving, unflavored and additive-free, third-party tested at the lowest cost per serving on this list.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克微粒化單水肌酸，無味零添加，第三方檢驗，每份成本是這份榜單最低的，純粹想長期補肌酸又不想花冤枉錢就是它。

en.description: 5 g of micronized creatine monohydrate per serving in unflavored and Raspberry Lemon, gluten-free and non-GMO, the mainstream pick that got a whole new audience into creatine.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克微粒化單水肌酸，有無味跟覆盆莓檸檬口味，無麩質非基改，社群帶起來的主流品牌，把一大批原本不碰肌酸的人拉進場，入門好上手。

en.description: 5 g of creatine monohydrate paired with dandelion and cranberry extract, a women-first formula built around minimal water retention and daily flavored mixing.

zh-tw.description: 每份 5 克單水肌酸搭配蒲公英與蔓越莓萃取，主打女性配方，訴求減少水腫感，調味好喝適合每天喝，想要女性專屬定位又要天天入口的可以看這款。

en.description: 5 g of micronized creatine per four-gummy serving with AstraGin for absorption, NSF certified, gelatin-free and marketed squarely at women who want an easy daily habit.

zh-tw.description: 每份四顆軟糖 5 克微粒化肌酸，加了 AstraGin 幫吸收，過 NSF 認證無明膠，主打女性客群，走的是好吃好養成習慣的路線，代價是每克肌酸成本偏高。

en.commentary: Creatine is the most studied sports supplement on earth, and the science keeps landing on the same boring, brilliant answer: 5 grams of creatine monohydrate a day. That makes this ranking less about exotic formulas and more about who delivers that clinical dose with the cleanest source and the most honest testing. On those terms, Thorne Creatine wins. It is single-ingredient Creapure monohydrate, NSF Certified for Sport on every batch, and it lands near 49 cents a serving in the 90-serving tub, which is premium testing at a value price. That combination is the whole game. Optimum Nutrition takes second because it does the fundamentals for even less. You get 5 grams of micronized monohydrate, banned-substance testing, and availability in basically every store on the planet, and for a daily consumable that price gap compounds over a year. Momentous earns third on purity alone. It is the only creatine here that publishes testing for PFAS, heavy metals, and microplastics on top of NSF Sport, so if a spotless label is your priority, this is the one. The gummy and women's-formula wave is the real 2026 story, and it deserves care. Independent labs found that nearly half of creatine gummies contain less than they claim, which is exactly why Create earns its spot: Creapure, NSF Sport, and Eurofins-verified potency. That is the only gummy I trust to hold a real dose. Bloom and Wellah brought a huge new audience of women into creatine, and the underlying monohydrate is legitimate, even if their third-party paperwork is lighter than the leaders. Lemme sits last on value, not quality, because you pay a premium for the gummy format and the branding. Every product here delivers real creatine monohydrate. The ranking reflects which one gives you the cleanest 5 grams for your money.

highlights.title: Thorne wins because a monohydrate ranking rewards fundamentals, not gimmicks
highlights.body: The evidence for creatine is built almost entirely on plain 5-gram monohydrate, so the best product is the one that delivers that dose with the cleanest source and the strictest testing. Thorne does exactly that: single-ingredient Creapure, NSF Certified for Sport on every batch, at roughly 49 cents a serving. You get pharmaceutical-grade testing at a price the boutique brands cannot match, which is why it sits at the top on merit rather than marketing.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition is the value benchmark the whole category is measured against
highlights.body: Five grams of micronized monohydrate, banned-substance testing, and a price near 34 cents a serving that you can buy in almost any store. Creatine is a daily habit you keep for years, so cost per serving is not a footnote, it is the deciding factor for most people. Optimum Nutrition delivers a proven dose for less than nearly anyone, and that makes it the smartest first tub for a beginner.

highlights.title: The gummy boom has a dosing problem, and Create is the fix
highlights.body: Independent testing in late 2025 found nearly half of creatine gummies contained less creatine than their labels claimed, which turns a convenient format into a coin flip. Create answers every part of that: Creapure source, NSF Certified for Sport, and Eurofins-verified potency confirming the dose is really there. If you want the ease of a gummy without gambling on the label, this is the one to buy.

highlights.title: Women's formulas expanded the market, and the monohydrate inside is legitimate
highlights.body: Bloom, Wellah, and Lemme pulled a whole new audience into creatine, and research backs the premise, since women carry markedly lower natural creatine stores and respond well to supplementation. The core ingredient in these products is real 5-gram monohydrate. They rank below the leaders on third-party paperwork and cost per gram, especially the gummies, but as a daily habit built for consistency they earn their place.

zh-tw.commentary: 肌酸是全世界被研究最透徹的運動補給品，而這麼多研究最後都指向同一個無聊又完美的答案，一天 5 克單水肌酸就對了。所以這份榜單比的不是花俏配方，而是誰能用最乾淨的原料跟最誠實的檢驗，把這個臨床劑量給你。照這個標準，Thorne Creatine 就是冠軍。單一成分 Creapure 單水肌酸，每一批都過 NSF Certified for Sport，90 份裝算下來一份大約台幣十五塊，高階等級的檢驗配上親民的價格，這組合基本上就是遊戲規則本身。Optimum Nutrition 拿第二，因為它把基本功做到更便宜。每份 5 克微粒化單水肌酸，禁用物質檢驗，而且幾乎到處都買得到，對一款要天天喝的耗材來說，這點價差一年下來差很多。Momentous 排第三純粹靠純度，它是這裡唯一在 NSF Sport 之上還公開檢驗 PFAS、重金屬與微塑膠的肌酸，成分潔癖優先的人就選它。軟糖跟女性配方這波才是 2026 年的真正主角，但要小心挑。獨立實驗室發現市面上將近一半的肌酸軟糖實際含量比標示少，這正是 Create 能站上榜的原因，Creapure 原料、NSF Sport、還請 Eurofins 驗過真實含量，這是我唯一敢說真的有足量的軟糖。Bloom 跟 Wellah 把一大批女性帶進肌酸市場，底層的單水肌酸是真材實料，只是第三方認證的文件比前段班薄一點。Lemme 排最後是輸在性價比，不是品質，你多付的是軟糖劑型跟品牌的錢。老實說這份榜單每一款都是真的肌酸，排名反映的是哪一款用同樣的錢給你最乾淨的那 5 克。

highlights.title: Thorne 贏在單水肌酸榜單獎勵的是基本功，不是噱頭
highlights.body: 肌酸的研究幾乎全建立在最單純的 5 克單水肌酸上，所以最好的產品就是用最乾淨的原料加最嚴的檢驗把這個劑量給你的那款。Thorne 就是這樣，單一成分 Creapure，每批過 NSF Certified for Sport，一份大約台幣十五塊。你拿到的是藥廠等級的檢驗，價格卻是那些精品小牌追不上的，它坐上第一靠的是實力，不是行銷。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition 是整個品類拿來當標竿的性價比基準
highlights.body: 每份 5 克微粒化單水肌酸，禁用物質檢驗，價格算下來一份大概台幣十塊出頭，而且幾乎到處都買得到。肌酸是一種你會吃好幾年的日常習慣，每份成本不是小事，對大多數人來說根本是決勝點。Optimum Nutrition 用比誰都低的價格給你經過驗證的劑量，這讓它成為新手第一罐最聰明的選擇。

highlights.title: 軟糖熱潮有個劑量問題，Create 就是解方
highlights.body: 2025 年底的獨立檢驗發現，市面上將近一半的肌酸軟糖實際含量比標示少，這讓方便的劑型變成一場賭博。Create 把每個環節都補上了，Creapure 原料、NSF Certified for Sport、再加 Eurofins 驗證真實含量確認劑量真的在裡面。想要軟糖的方便又不想賭標示的人，買這款就對了。

highlights.title: 女性配方擴大了市場，裡面的單水肌酸是真材實料
highlights.body: Bloom、Wellah 跟 Lemme 把一整批新受眾拉進肌酸市場，而且這個前提有研究撐腰，女性天生的肌酸儲存量明顯較低，補充後反應很好。這些產品核心就是真的 5 克單水肌酸。它們排在前段班後面，是輸在第三方文件跟每克成本，軟糖尤其明顯，但作為一個為了持續而設計的日常習慣，它們站得住這個位置。

references.title: We Tested the Best Creatine Monohydrate Supplements in 2026
Best Creatine Supplements of 2026: RD Approved

en.commentary: Thorne Creatine keeps my top spot this week and the reason is simple: it is a single ingredient tub of clean, NSF Certified for Sport monohydrate at a price that never makes you flinch. When the whole category boils down to getting 5g of well tested monohydrate into your body every day, Thorne nails the essentials without asking you to pay for flavor gimmicks. Optimum Nutrition stays at number two because it is the value king, and if you buy in bulk the per serving cost is hard to beat anywhere. I do want to flag movement in the reviews this week. Forbes crowned Transparent Labs Creatine HMB as its overall winner, and I get the appeal since the added HMB and clean formulation are genuinely good. It sits fourth for me only because you pay a premium for that HMB, and the research on HMB stacking is softer than the mountain of evidence behind plain monohydrate. Momentous holds third on the strength of Creapure sourcing and third party testing that competitive athletes trust. The gummy formats keep growing in popularity and Create earns its sixth spot for taste and testing, though the value math still favors powder if you are dosing daily. My steady advice has not changed: pick any third party tested 5g monohydrate, take it every single day, and do not overthink the fancier forms.

highlights.title: Thorne stays the smart default
highlights.body: Single ingredient, NSF Certified for Sport, and priced fairly. A 9.7 on testing is why it holds my number one across the board.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs took a Forbes crown
highlights.body: Forbes named its Creatine HMB the overall winner this week. I keep it fourth because you pay a premium for HMB that plain monohydrate does not need.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition owns value
highlights.body: A 9.8 on value and reliable micronized mixability make it the bulk buyer's pick and my steady number two.

highlights.title: Gummies are convenient, not cheaper
highlights.body: Create scores well on taste and testing at sixth, but powder still wins the cost per gram if you dose every day.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Thorne 肌酸依然守住我的第一，原因很單純，它就是一罐單一成分、通過 NSF Certified for Sport 認證的乾淨單水肌酸，價格又親民到你不會皺眉。整個品類講到底就是每天把 5g 經過良好檢測的單水肌酸吃進身體，Thorne 把基本功做好，也不會逼你為了口味花招掏錢。ON 穩坐第二，因為它就是 CP 值之王，整桶大包裝買下去，每份成本幾乎沒對手。這禮拜評測有些變動我想提一下，Forbes 把 Transparent Labs 的 Creatine HMB 選為總冠軍，我懂它的魅力，多加的 HMB 跟乾淨配方確實不錯。它在我這只排第四，是因為那個 HMB 要你多付錢，而 HMB 堆疊的研究，比起單水肌酸那座證據大山還是軟了一截。Momentous 靠 Creapure 原料跟競技選手信任的第三方檢測守住第三。軟糖劑型人氣一直在漲，Create 靠口味跟檢測拿下第六，不過每天固定吃的話，成本帳還是粉狀划算。我一貫的建議沒變，挑任何一款有第三方檢測的 5g 單水肌酸，每天乖乖吃，那些花俏的形式別想太多。

highlights.title: Thorne 依然是聰明的預設值
highlights.body: 單一成分、NSF Certified for Sport 認證、價格公道，檢測面拿 9.7 分，這就是它全面守住第一的原因。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 拿下 Forbes 冠軍
highlights.body: 這禮拜 Forbes 把它的 Creatine HMB 選為總冠軍。我讓它排第四，是因為 HMB 要你多付錢，而單水肌酸根本不需要它。

highlights.title: ON 掌握 CP 值
highlights.body: 價值面 9.8 分加上可靠的微粒化沖泡性，讓它成為大包裝買家的首選跟我穩定的第二名。

highlights.title: 軟糖方便但不便宜
highlights.body: Create 靠口味跟檢測拿第六，但每天吃的話,每克成本還是粉狀勝出。

references.title: We Tested the Best Creatine Monohydrate Supplements in 2026

en.commentary: Thorne stays my number one, and after another week of reading the round-ups I am more comfortable with that than ever. This is a single-ingredient creatine monohydrate at the clinically studied 5g dose, and it carries NSF Certified for Sport, which screens for close to 300 banned substances. That combination of a clean label and a certification you can actually verify is exactly what I want anyone spending money on creatine to look for. Optimum Nutrition holds second because it does the same job for less, carrying the Informed Choice seal that batch-screens for more than 200 banned substances, and at its price it is the one I hand to friends who just want results without overthinking it. The one adjustment I made this week is nudging Transparent Labs on testing, because the coverage keeps highlighting that it is among the very few brands publishing its third-party purity results for the public to read. That transparency deserves recognition even though its higher price keeps it at fourth. Momentous stays third on sheer purity and testing pedigree, and it remains the pick for athletes who want the most premium label in the cabinet. Everything below moved not at all, because creatine is an evergreen category and nothing this week changed the fundamentals. My advice has not shifted. Buy plain creatine monohydrate at 5g a day, pick a brand that shows you a third-party certification, and stop chasing exotic formats. The gummies and women-branded tubs are fine if they get you to take it daily, and that consistency matters more than the label on the front.

highlights.title: Thorne is still the standard
highlights.body: Single-ingredient monohydrate, a clinical 5g dose, and NSF Certified for Sport screening for nearly 300 banned substances. Verifiable quality is why it holds first.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition is the value play
highlights.body: The same 5g monohydrate job with an Informed Choice seal and a friendlier price. This is the tub I recommend to people who just want to start.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs earns a testing bump
highlights.body: It is one of the few brands publishing its third-party purity results publicly. I raised its testing score to 9.5, though the higher price keeps it at fourth.

highlights.title: Format is a consistency tool
highlights.body: Gummies and women-branded tubs sit lower on value, yet if a chewable is what gets you dosing daily, that daily habit is what actually delivers results.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne 還是我心中的第一，這週又把幾篇評測掃過一輪之後，我對這個選擇更有把握了。它就是純肌酸單水合物，劑量給到臨床實證的一天五克，而且拿了 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，會篩檢將近三百種禁用物質。乾淨的成分表加上一個你真的查得到的認證，這正是我希望每個花錢買肌酸的人該盯著看的東西。Optimum Nutrition 守住第二，因為它用更便宜的價格做一樣的事，有 Informed Choice 認證，每一批都篩超過兩百種禁用物質，這個價位我都直接推給只想看到效果、不想想太多的朋友。這週我唯一動的地方是把 Transparent Labs 的檢驗分數往上加，因為評測一直在強調它是極少數會把第三方純度報告公開給大家看的品牌。這種透明度值得肯定，只是它價格偏高所以還是排第四。Momentous 靠純度跟檢驗血統守住第三，想在櫃子裡放一罐最高階的，它還是首選。下面的名次全部沒動，因為肌酸本來就是常青品類，這週沒有任何事情改變基本盤。我的建議一樣沒變。每天五克純肌酸單水合物，挑一個會給你看第三方認證的牌子，別再追那些花俏的形式了。軟糖跟女性專用罐裝都沒問題，只要能讓你每天乖乖吃，這個持續性比包裝上寫什麼重要多了。

highlights.title: Thorne 仍是標竿
highlights.body: 純單水合物、臨床劑量一天五克，加上 NSF Certified for Sport 篩檢近三百種禁用物質。查得到的品質就是它守第一的原因。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition 是 CP 值之選
highlights.body: 一樣的五克單水合物，有 Informed Choice 認證，價格更親民。想開始補肌酸的人我都推這一罐。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 檢驗加分
highlights.body: 它是少數會公開第三方純度報告的品牌。我把檢驗分數提到 9.5，但價格偏高讓它維持第四。

highlights.title: 形式是幫你養成習慣
highlights.body: 軟糖跟女性專用罐裝的 CP 值排比較後面，但只要一顆軟糖能讓你每天補到，那個每天的習慣才是真正帶來效果的關鍵。

references.title: We Tested the Best Creatine Monohydrate Supplements in 2026
The 7 best creatine powders for 2026, according to dietitians

en.commentary: Thorne Creatine stays my number one because it pairs the simplest possible formula, a single ingredient of pure creatine monohydrate, with NSF Certified for Sport testing and a price that is fair for that level of quality. This week Healthline and Forbes both kept it in their top tier, and I keep recommending it to anyone who wants proven results without paying a premium for a name. What I value about Thorne is that there is nothing to second-guess, you get the clinical 5-gram dose, it mixes cleanly, and the certification means it is screened for banned substances if you compete. Optimum Nutrition Micronized holds a close second on pure value, it delivers the same monohydrate at a price that makes daily use effortless, and it is the tub I point budget-focused lifters toward. Momentous stays third because its Creapure sourcing with both NSF and Informed Sport seals is the gold standard for anyone under formal drug testing, the only reason it is not higher is that Thorne offers comparable credentials for less. Transparent Labs Creatine HMB keeps fourth for people who want the added HMB, and Legion holds fifth on clean formulation and mixability. Down the list, the gummy options from Create and Lemme keep earning their place for people who will actually take creatine more consistently in gummy form, which matters more than any spec. Nothing this week moved my order.

highlights.title: Thorne Creatine is the safe top pick
highlights.body: A single ingredient of pure monohydrate, NSF Certified for Sport, and a fair price for that quality. There is nothing to second-guess, which is why it stays number one.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition wins on value
highlights.body: The same clinical monohydrate at a price that makes daily use effortless. It is the tub I point budget-focused lifters toward, and it holds a close second.

highlights.title: Momentous is the gold standard for tested athletes
highlights.body: Creapure sourcing with both NSF and Informed Sport seals. If you compete under formal drug testing, it is a top choice, held to third only because Thorne matches the credentials for less.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs and Legion for formulation fans
highlights.body: The Transparent Labs Creatine HMB adds HMB for recovery, while Legion earns its spot on a clean formula and excellent mixability.

highlights.title: Gummies count when they build the habit
highlights.body: The Create and Lemme gummies keep their spots because the best creatine is the one you actually take daily, and gummy form helps many people stay consistent.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne Creatine 這週還是我的第一，它把最單純的配方，單一成分的純肌酸單水合物，配上 NSF Certified for Sport 認證跟對得起這個品質的公道價。這禮拜 Healthline 跟 Forbes 都還是把它列在最前段，想要有實證效果又不想為品牌多付錢的人我都推它。我最欣賞 Thorne 的地方是沒有任何需要多想的地方，你拿到臨床劑量 5 克、溶得乾淨，有比賽需求的人這張認證代表它有篩過禁藥。Optimum Nutrition 微粉化款靠純性價比守住很接近的第二，一樣的單水合物，價格讓你天天吃也毫無壓力，預算取向的人我都指這罐。Momentous 排第三，它的 Creapure 原料加上 NSF 跟 Informed Sport 雙認證是受正式藥檢的人的黃金標準，它沒排更前面的唯一原因，是 Thorne 用更便宜的價格給你差不多的認證。Transparent Labs Creatine HMB 守住第四，適合想多補 HMB 的人，Legion 靠乾淨配方跟沖泡性守住第五。往下看，Create 跟 Lemme 的軟糖款守住位置是因為，對某些人來說軟糖形式才吃得比較規律，這件事比任何規格都重要。這週沒有消息讓我動排名。

highlights.title: Thorne Creatine 最穩的首選
highlights.body: 單一成分純單水合物、NSF Certified for Sport、品質對得起公道價。沒有任何需要多想的地方，所以穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition 性價比取勝
highlights.body: 一樣的臨床單水合物，價格讓你天天吃毫無壓力。預算取向的人我都指這罐,守住很接近的第二。

highlights.title: Momentous 藥檢族的黃金標準
highlights.body: Creapure 原料加 NSF 跟 Informed Sport 雙認證。受正式藥檢的人首選,排第三只因為 Thorne 用更便宜的價格給你同級認證。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 跟 Legion 給愛研究配方的人
highlights.body: Transparent Labs Creatine HMB 多加 HMB 幫恢復，Legion 靠乾淨配方跟優秀沖泡性守住位置。

highlights.title: 軟糖能養成習慣就有價值
highlights.body: Create 跟 Lemme 軟糖守住位置是因為，最好的肌酸是你真的天天吃的那種，軟糖形式幫很多人吃得更規律。

references.title: We Tested the Best Creatine Monohydrate Supplements in 2026

en.commentary: Thorne Creatine keeps the top spot because it pairs the strongest third-party assurance in the category with a clean, single-ingredient formula. This week's reviews again singled it out as the default pick for drug-tested athletes, thanks to NSF Certified for Sport screening against banned substances and label accuracy. It mixes tasteless into anything and delivers the full clinical 5 grams. That is exactly what I want from a creatine, and it earns rank one. Optimum Nutrition Micronized holds a very close second and is the value champion I recommend most often. The latest testing praised its finer grind for mixing cleaner than standard monohydrate, and it lands well below Thorne on cost per serving while still being banned-substance tested. If certification is not your top concern, this is the smart buy. Momentous stays third for its premium sourcing and Creapure-grade purity. Nothing this week, no recall, no reformulation, moved the rankings, and the coverage reinforced the exact order I already had. So I kept every rank and score. Creatine is the most studied supplement there is, and the winning products are settled. Chasing tiny weekly changes would only add noise. These ten are ranked by purity, testing, clinical dose, format, and value, and I stand behind the order.

highlights.title: Thorne leads on trust
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport screening plus a clean single-ingredient formula make it the default for drug-tested athletes. It mixes tasteless and delivers the full clinical 5 grams.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition is the value champ
highlights.body: A finer micronized grind mixes cleaner than standard monohydrate, it stays banned-substance tested, and it lands well below Thorne per serving. My most frequent recommendation.

highlights.title: Momentous for premium purity
highlights.body: Creapure-grade sourcing keeps it at third. The pick when you want the cleanest raw material and certification to match.

highlights.title: A settled category
highlights.body: No recall or reformulation this week moved anything, and the coverage matched my existing order. I kept every rank and score rather than add noise.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne Creatine 繼續坐第一，因為它把全類別最強的第三方認證，跟乾淨的單一成分配方綁在一起。這禮拜的評測又點名它是受藥檢運動員的預設首選，靠的是 NSF Certified for Sport，針對違禁成分篩檢、標示也準。它泡進任何東西都沒味道，一份給滿臨床劑量 5 克。這正是我對肌酸的要求，第一名它拿得漂亮。Optimum Nutrition 微粒化肌酸緊咬第二，是我最常推的 CP 值王。最新檢測誇它顆粒更細、比一般單水肌酸更好泡，單份成本壓在 Thorne 下面一截，又照樣做過違禁成分檢驗。認證擺後面一點的人，這台就是聰明買法。Momentous 守第三，靠頂級來源跟 Creapure 等級純度。這禮拜沒有召回、沒有改配方，排名沒動，報導反而正好呼應我原本的順序。所以每個名次跟分數我都留著。肌酸是研究最透徹的補劑，贏家早就底定，每週追著小數點跑只會增加雜訊。這十款是按純度、檢測、臨床劑量、劑型跟 CP 值排的，這個順序我挺。

highlights.title: Thorne 贏在信任
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport 篩檢加上乾淨的單一成分，讓它成為受藥檢運動員的預設首選。泡起來沒味道，一份給滿臨床劑量 5 克。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition 是 CP 值王
highlights.body: 微粒化顆粒更細、比一般單水肌酸好泡，照樣做過違禁成分檢驗，單份成本又壓在 Thorne 下面。我最常推的一款。

highlights.title: Momentous 拚頂級純度
highlights.body: Creapure 等級來源讓它守住第三。想要最乾淨原料加對得上的認證，就選它。

highlights.title: 早已底定的類別
highlights.body: 這禮拜沒有召回或改配方動到任何東西，報導又呼應我原本的順序。我把名次跟分數全留著，不加雜訊。

references.title: We Tested the Best Creatine Monohydrate Supplements in 2026

en.commentary: ConsumerLab published a fresh round on July 6, testing eleven creatine products, and one failed quality testing. That single data point is exactly why I keep Thorne at rank one. Third-party testing and a clean single-ingredient formula are the whole ballgame with creatine, and Thorne clears both bars without asking you to pay a boutique premium. Nothing about this week moves it. Optimum Nutrition holds second because it does the boring things perfectly, a true 5g micronized dose that mixes clean, sold at a price per serving that undercuts almost everyone. Momentous stays third on the strength of the purest sourcing and testing in the group, and I only keep it behind ON because you pay for that pedigree. Transparent Labs earns fourth with its Creatine HMB formula, which several outlets are still naming a top overall pick in 2026, and Legion rounds out my front five with a genuinely clean micronized powder. The gummy formats, Create and Lemme, keep their footing lower down. They are convenient and well tested, yet you pay more per gram and the dose runs a touch under the powders. With a fresh testing cycle confirming that certification separates the good from the risky, I am holding every rank exactly where it sat. Creatine monohydrate is still the most studied form on the shelf, and no new evidence this week suggests paying up for anything fancier.

highlights.title: Thorne stays the safe number one
highlights.body: A fresh ConsumerLab round saw one product fail testing. Thorne clears third-party testing with a clean single-ingredient formula, which is why it holds the top spot.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition wins on value
highlights.body: A true 5g micronized dose that mixes without grit, at a per-serving price almost nobody beats. It stays my default recommendation for most lifters.

highlights.title: Momentous for purest sourcing
highlights.body: The cleanest sourcing and testing in the group keep it at rank three. You pay for that pedigree, which is the only reason it sits behind ON.

highlights.title: Gummies trade grams for convenience
highlights.body: Create and Lemme are well tested and easy to take, yet cost more per gram and dose slightly under the powders. Handy, not the value play.

zh-tw.commentary: ConsumerLab 在 7 月 6 日發了新一輪報告，測了十一款肌酸，其中一款沒過品質檢驗。就這一個數據，正好說明我為什麼把 Thorne 放第一。肌酸這東西，第三方檢驗跟乾淨的單一成分配方就是全部重點，Thorne 兩關都過，而且沒要你付精品價。這週沒有任何理由動它。Optimum Nutrition 守住第二，因為它把基本功做到滿，紮實的 5 克微粒化劑量、沖起來不結塊，每份單價又壓得比幾乎所有人都低。Momentous 排第三，靠的是這組裡最純的原料跟檢驗，我把它放在 ON 後面，純粹是因為這身家要多花錢。Transparent Labs 拿第四，它的 Creatine HMB 配方到 2026 年還有好幾家媒體選為整體首選；Legion 補上前五,粉末真的乾淨。軟糖那兩款 Create 跟 Lemme 名次守在後段,方便、檢驗也做得好,可是每克要多花錢,劑量又比粉末略低一點。這輪新檢驗再次證明有沒有認證就是好貨跟地雷的分水嶺,所以我把每個名次都原封不動。肌酸單水合物到現在還是架上研究最多的形式,這週也沒有新證據要你多花錢買花俏的。

highlights.title: Thorne 穩坐第一最安心
highlights.body: 新一輪 ConsumerLab 有一款沒過檢驗。Thorne 第三方檢驗過關又是乾淨單一成分,這就是它守住第一的原因。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition CP 值最強
highlights.body: 紮實 5 克微粒化、沖起來不結塊,每份單價幾乎沒人比得過。對多數重訓的人它就是我的預設答案。

highlights.title: Momentous 原料最純
highlights.body: 這組裡原料跟檢驗最乾淨,穩在第三。這身家要多花錢,也是它排在 ON 後面的唯一理由。

highlights.title: 軟糖用克數換方便
highlights.body: Create 跟 Lemme 檢驗做得好又好入口,但每克貴一些、劑量略低於粉末。方便有餘,划算不足。
